name: Bruce Firmware (BETA)
author: pr3y-dev
description: Bruce is a custom firmware for the M5Stack Carduputer, designed to enhance its functionality and user experience. This beta version includes new features and improvements over the stock firmware.

author: Meshtastic
description: An open source, off-grid, decentralized mesh network built to run on affordable, low-power devices. No cell towers. No internet. Just pure peer-to-peer connectivity.
name: Meshtastic

author: Meshtastic
description: An open source, off-grid, decentralized mesh network built to run on affordable, low-power devices. No cell towers. No internet. Just pure peer-to-peer connectivity.
name: Meshtastic Fancy UI
Marauder for T-Deck
author: jstockdale
description: A suite of WiFi/Bluetooth offensive and defensive tools for the ESP32. Use Launcher to install

name: SigurdOS
author: hermes-gadget
description: Standalone off-grid LoRa mesh messaging firmware for the LilyGo T-Deck (ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + ST7789 240×320 TFT touchscreen + physical QWERTY keyboard).

name: Ghost v2.0
author: GhostESP-Revival
description: Welcome to Ghost ESP, a robust and feature-rich firmware designed for your ESP32 microcontroller, enabling advanced wireless network exploration and security testing. With Ghost ESP installed, you can leverage the power of your ESP32 device to conduct in-depth WiFi and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) analysis, launch strategic wireless attacks, and explore a wide range of wireless environments.

name: MeshOS (T-Deck)
author: meshcore
description: Easy to use, smartphone-like MeshCore experience. Activate your license on: https://meshcore.co.uk/activate.html

name: Launcher (T-Deck)
author: bmorcelli
description: With this app you can turn your device into a swiss knife, loading any .bin you have on your SD Card or wirelessly downloading from M5Burner repo or from your computer/smartphone through its WebUI.

name: Launcher (T-Deck Plus)
author: bmorcelli
description: With this app you can turn your device into a swiss knife, loading any .bin you have on your SD Card or wirelessly downloading from M5Burner repo or from your computer/smartphone through its WebUI.

name: Bruce (T-Deck)
author: pr3y
description:
VISIT https://bruce.computer
CHECK OUR GITHUB! supporting CC1101 and NRF24
https://github.com/BruceDevices/firmware
WiFi - BLE - RFID - RF - GPS - FM - NRF24 - Connect - Others
### Our wiki: https://github.com/BruceDevices/bruce/wiki ### Discord: https://discord.gg/WJ9XF9czVT

name: Bruce (T-Deck Plus)
author: pr3y
description:
VISIT https://bruce.computer
CHECK OUR GITHUB! supporting CC1101 and NRF24
https://github.com/BruceDevices/firmware
WiFi - BLE - RFID - RF - GPS - FM - NRF24 - Connect - Others
### Our wiki: https://github.com/BruceDevices/bruce/wiki ### Discord: https://discord.gg/WJ9XF9czVT

name: Ratdeck (T-Deck)
author: ratspeak
description: Standalone Reticulum for T-Deck, based on microReticulum.

name: Pyxis (T-Deck)
author: torlando-tech
description: An LXMF and LXST client firmware for T-Deck.

name: Trail Mate (T-Deck)
author: vicliu624
description: Trail Mate is an offline‑first handheld system for GPS navigation, multi-protocol communication (Meshtastic / MeshCore / Reticulum), and real‑time team situational awareness in no‑network environments.

name: Tactility (T-Deck)
author: bytewelder
description:
Tactility is an operating system that focuses on the ESP32 microcontroller family.
 See https://tactilityproject.org for more information.

name: WADAMESH (T-Deck Plus)
author: ALLFATHER-BV
description: MeshCore companion radio with a full touch UI for the LilyGo T-Deck — LoRa mesh DMs, channels & room servers, contacts, offline maps, and multi-language keyboards.

name: WADAMESH BETA (T-Deck Plus)
author: ALLFATHER-BV
description: Test builds of WADAMESH — the newest features before they reach the stable channel, less tested. For everyday use install the stable WADAMESH entry instead. MeshCore companion radio with a full touch UI for the LilyGo T-Deck.

name: Saitama (T-Deck Plus)
author: 868meshbot
description: Open-source standalone firmware for LoRa mesh devices. Built on MeshCore, designed for the LilyGo T-Deck and T-Deck Plus.

name: meshcoreterm (T-Deck Plus)
author: dabeani
description: MeshCore is a lightweight hybrid routing mesh protocol for packet radios... this Repo is mainly about the companion firmware for user-friendly UIs and (actually) support for devices such as the LilyGO T-Deck Plus and Seeed Studio SenseCap Indicator-TFT AND you can connect via BLE or WiFi with the typical APPs (WebUI, iOS,...).

name: MCLite (T-Deck Plus)
author: laserir
description: Lightweight off-grid communicator firmware for the LilyGo T-Deck Plus and T-Watch Ultra. Built on MeshCore, MCLite is purpose-built for emergency and outdoor communication -- no internet, no cell towers, no training needed. Turn it on and communicate.

name: XNode (T-Deck Plus)
author: MKme
description: XNODE is built to work with the MKME X software stack. Add the companion software below to turn the watch into part of a larger offline tactical comms, mapping, and intelligence workflow.

name: MeshPunk (Plus)
author: PhilMo6
description: MeshPunk - LVGL with Lua for T-Deck

name: Camillia-MT (T-Deck)
author: Michael A. Cojocari
description: Meshtastic-compatible mesh radio firmware for ESP32-S3 handheld LoRa devices. Features 8 configurable LoRa channels, DMs, GPS, web configuration UI, YAML config via microSD, themes, and traceroute.
